variables.input:
fetch bizevents
| summarize companies = collectDistinct(companyName)
| expand companies
| sort companies
| fields companies

fetch bizevents
| filter if("$CompanyName" != "*", companyName == $CompanyName, else: true)
| summarize journeys = collectDistinct(journeyType)
| expand journeys
| sort journeys
| fields journeys

fetch bizevents
| filter if("$CompanyName" != "*", companyName == $CompanyName, else: true)
| summarize services = collectDistinct(serviceName)
| expand services
| sort services
| fields services

fetch dt.entity.service
| filter in(entity.name, array($Service))
| dedup id
| fields id
| limit 50

0.content:
## 💼 Business Self-Service Dashboard — $CompanyName
Real-time business observability powered by **Dynatrace BizObs Demonstrator**. Track revenue, orders, customer journeys and the business impact of technical issues.

**TO START:** Select your Company, Journey Type and Services from the dropdowns above. All tiles auto-populate from your business events.

2.title: Total Revenue
2.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter if("$CompanyName" != "*", companyName == $CompanyName, else: true)
| filter if("$JourneyType" != "*", in(journeyType, array($JourneyType)), else: true)
| filter event.type == "com.bizobs.checkout.success" or event.type == "com.bizobs.order.completed" or matchesPhrase(event.type, "checkout_success") or matchesPhrase(event.type, "order")
| summarize totalRevenue = sum(totalAmount)

3.title: Total Orders
3.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter if("$CompanyName" != "*", companyName == $CompanyName, else: true)
| filter if("$JourneyType" != "*", in(journeyType, array($JourneyType)), else: true)
| filter event.type == "com.bizobs.checkout.success" or event.type == "com.bizobs.order.completed" or matchesPhrase(event.type, "checkout_success") or matchesPhrase(event.type, "order")
| summarize totalOrders = countDistinct(orderId)

4.title: Failed Transactions
4.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter if("$CompanyName" != "*", companyName == $CompanyName, else: true)
| filter if("$JourneyType" != "*", in(journeyType, array($JourneyType)), else: true)
| filter event.type == "com.bizobs.checkout.failure" or matchesPhrase(event.type, "checkout_failure") or matchesPhrase(event.type, "error")
| summarize failedOrders = count()

5.title: Avg Order Value
5.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter if("$CompanyName" != "*", companyName == $CompanyName, else: true)
| filter if("$JourneyType" != "*", in(journeyType, array($JourneyType)), else: true)
| filter event.type == "com.bizobs.checkout.success" or event.type == "com.bizobs.order.completed" or matchesPhrase(event.type, "checkout_success") or matchesPhrase(event.type, "order")
| summarize avgOrderValue = avg(totalAmount)

6.title: Revenue Over Time
6.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter if("$CompanyName" != "*", companyName == $CompanyName, else: true)
| filter if("$JourneyType" != "*", in(journeyType, array($JourneyType)), else: true)
| filter event.type == "com.bizobs.checkout.success" or event.type == "com.bizobs.order.completed" or matchesPhrase(event.type, "checkout_success") or matchesPhrase(event.type, "order")
| makeTimeseries revenue = sum(totalAmount), interval: 10m

7.title: Order Volume Over Time
7.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter if("$CompanyName" != "*", companyName == $CompanyName, else: true)
| filter if("$JourneyType" != "*", in(journeyType, array($JourneyType)), else: true)
| filter event.type == "com.bizobs.checkout.success" or event.type == "com.bizobs.order.completed" or matchesPhrase(event.type, "checkout_success") or matchesPhrase(event.type, "order")
| makeTimeseries orders = count(), interval: 10m

9.title: Revenue by Journey Type
9.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter if("$CompanyName" != "*", companyName == $CompanyName, else: true)
| filter event.type == "com.bizobs.checkout.success" or event.type == "com.bizobs.order.completed" or matchesPhrase(event.type, "checkout_success") or matchesPhrase(event.type, "order")
| summarize revenue = sum(totalAmount), by: { journeyType }
| sort revenue desc
| limit 20

10.title: Orders by Journey Type
10.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter if("$CompanyName" != "*", companyName == $CompanyName, else: true)
| filter event.type == "com.bizobs.checkout.success" or event.type == "com.bizobs.order.completed" or matchesPhrase(event.type, "checkout_success") or matchesPhrase(event.type, "order")
| summarize orders = count(), by: { journeyType }
| sort orders desc
| limit 20

12.title: Revenue by Service
12.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter if("$CompanyName" != "*", companyName == $CompanyName, else: true)
| filter if("$JourneyType" != "*", in(journeyType, array($JourneyType)), else: true)
| filter event.type == "com.bizobs.checkout.success" or event.type == "com.bizobs.order.completed" or matchesPhrase(event.type, "checkout_success") or matchesPhrase(event.type, "order")
| summarize revenue = sum(totalAmount), orders = count(), by: { serviceName }
| fieldsAdd revenueBar = revenue
| sort revenue desc
| limit 15

14.query:
fetch dt.davis.problems
| filter dt.davis.is_duplicate == false
| sort timestamp desc
| expand affected_entity_ids
| lookup [fetch dt.entity.service], sourceField:affected_entity_ids, lookupField: id, prefix:"lookup.affected.entity.services"
| lookup [fetch dt.entity.process_group_instance], sourceField:affected_entity_ids, lookupField: id, prefix:"lookup.affected.entity.pgi"
| lookup [fetch dt.entity.application], sourceField:affected_entity_ids, lookupField: id, prefix:"lookup.affected.entity.applications"
| lookup [fetch dt.entity.host], sourceField:affected_entity_ids, lookupField: id, prefix:"lookup.affected.entity.hosts"
| summarize {
    startTime = takeFirst(event.start),
    endTime = takeFirst(event.end),
    problemClosedDuration = takeFirst(resolved_problem_duration),
    status = takeFirst(event.status),
    event.name = takeFirst(event.name),
    severityLevel = takeFirst(event.category),
    rootCause = takeFirst(root_cause_entity_name),
    rootCauseEntityId = takeFirst(root_cause_entity_id),
    dt.davis.is_duplicate = takeFirst(dt.davis.is_duplicate),
    affectedServices = collectDistinct(lookup.affected.entity.servicesentity.name),
    affectedPGI = collectDistinct(lookup.affected.entity.pgientity.name),
    affectedApplications = collectDistinct(lookup.affected.entity.applicationsentity.name),
    affectedHosts = collectDistinct(lookup.affected.entity.hostsentity.name),
    event.id = takeFirst(event.id)
  },
  by:{display_id, event.kind}
| fieldsAdd currentTime = toTimestamp(now())
| fields
    Status = if((status == "ACTIVE"), "🔴 OPEN", else: if((status == "CLOSED"), "🟢 CLOSED")),
    Problem = concat("🔥[", display_id, " - ", event.name, "](/ui/apps/dynatrace.davis.problems/problem/", event.id, ")"),
    Severity = severityLevel,
    Affected = arrayRemoveNulls(arrayConcat(affectedApplications, affectedServices, affectedPGI, affectedHosts)),
    RootCause = if(isNotNull(rootCause),
      concat("[", rootCause, "](/ui/apps/dynatrace.services/explorer?detailsId=", rootCauseEntityId, ")"),
      else: ""),
    StartTime = startTime,
    Duration = if((status == "CLOSED"), problemClosedDuration, else: if((status == "ACTIVE"), currentTime - startTime)),
    event.id,
    event.kind
| sort StartTime desc
| limit 25

15.title: Estimated Revenue at Risk
15.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter if("$CompanyName" != "*", companyName == $CompanyName, else: true)
| filter if("$JourneyType" != "*", in(journeyType, array($JourneyType)), else: true)
| filter event.type == "com.bizobs.checkout.failure" or matchesPhrase(event.type, "checkout_failure") or matchesPhrase(event.type, "error")
| summarize failedCount = count()
| lookup [
    fetch bizevents
    | filter event.type == "com.bizobs.checkout.success" or event.type == "com.bizobs.order.completed" or matchesPhrase(event.type, "checkout_success") or matchesPhrase(event.type, "order")
    | summarize avgValue = avg(totalAmount)
  ], fields: { avgValue }
| fieldsAdd estimatedLoss = failedCount * avgValue
| fields failedCount, avgValue, estimatedLoss

17.title: Success vs Failure Over Time
17.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter if("$CompanyName" != "*", companyName == $CompanyName, else: true)
| filter if("$JourneyType" != "*", in(journeyType, array($JourneyType)), else: true)
| fieldsAdd isSuccess = if(matchesPhrase(event.type, "success") or matchesPhrase(event.type, "completed"), 1, else: 0)
| fieldsAdd isFailure = if(matchesPhrase(event.type, "failure") or matchesPhrase(event.type, "error"), 1, else: 0)
| makeTimeseries success = sum(isSuccess), failed = sum(isFailure), interval: 10m

18.title: Top Products by Revenue
18.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter if("$CompanyName" != "*", companyName == $CompanyName, else: true)
| filter if("$JourneyType" != "*", in(journeyType, array($JourneyType)), else: true)
| filter event.type == "com.bizobs.checkout.success" or event.type == "com.bizobs.order.completed" or matchesPhrase(event.type, "checkout_success") or matchesPhrase(event.type, "order")
| summarize revenue = sum(totalAmount), quantity = sum(quantity), by: { productName }
| fieldsAdd revenueBar = revenue
| sort revenue desc
| limit 10

20.title: Top Products by Quantity
20.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter if("$CompanyName" != "*", companyName == $CompanyName, else: true)
| filter if("$JourneyType" != "*", in(journeyType, array($JourneyType)), else: true)
| filter event.type == "com.bizobs.checkout.success" or event.type == "com.bizobs.order.completed" or matchesPhrase(event.type, "checkout_success") or matchesPhrase(event.type, "order")
| summarize quantity = sum(quantity), by: { productName }
| sort quantity desc
| limit 10

21.title: Service Health
21.query:
timeseries {requests = sum(dt.service.request.count),
            errors = sum(dt.service.request.failure_count)},
            by:{dt.entity.service}
| fieldsAdd Requests = arraySum(requests),
            Errors = arraySum(errors)
| fieldsAdd `Failure Rate` = (Errors / Requests) * 100
| fieldsAdd Service = entityName(dt.entity.service)
| fieldsAdd `Analyze` = concat("[Open Service](/ui/apps/dynatrace.services/explorer?detailsId=", dt.entity.service, ")")
| fields
    Status = if(`Failure Rate` >= 2.00, "🔴", else: "🟢"),
    Service,
    `Analyze`,
    Requests,
    `Failure Rate`,
    Errors
| sort `Failure Rate` desc
| filterOut matchesPhrase(Service, "background threads") or matchesPhrase(Service, "Health")
| limit 20

23.query: data record(a="📌 SELECT your Company and Journey Type with the filters above. All tiles update automatically. Click any 🔥 Problem or Service link to drill into Dynatrace.")

24.title: Bizevents Activity Heatmap
24.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter if("$CompanyName" != "*", companyName == $CompanyName, else: true)
| filter if("$JourneyType" != "*", in(journeyType, array($JourneyType)), else: true)
| summarize eventCount = count(), by: { event.type }
| sort eventCount desc
| limit 30
